DFFlagQuantizeCollisionCost_Staged.purpose: Improves game performance by making collision detection more efficient.

FIntRelocateMobileMenuButtonsVariant_IXP.purpose: Enhances user experience by making navigation easier on mobile.

DFIntVideoWinHwEncoderMinQuickSyncH264Fi.purpose: Ensures better video quality and compatibility for recorded gameplay.
